prompt: buffer.py has method stubs that raise NotImplementedError. Implement the BoundedBuffer class so all tests in test_buffer.py pass. The tests include concurrent producer/consumer scenarios with real threads.
on_fail: Tests are still failing. The concurrent tests are sensitive to the notify/wait protocol. Make sure close() wakes ALL waiting threads, and that get() only raises Closed when the buffer is both closed AND empty.

goals.description: Read both files, implement the whole class in one edit, verify. The threading must be correct on the first attempt.
